name: @p697/clawket
description: Clawket CLI for pairing and running the Relay bridge runtime

scripts.build:bundle: npm run --workspace @clawket/bridge-core build && npm run --workspace @clawket/bridge-runtime build && node scripts/build-bundle.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npm run --workspace @clawket/bridge-core build && npm run --workspace @clawket/bridge-runtime build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: npm run --workspace @clawket/bridge-core build && npm run --workspace @clawket/bridge-runtime build && vitest run --passWithNoTests
scripts.prepack: npm run build && npm run verify:package
